Title:
Title-Source: body_internal|generated
No-Joke-Found: false

A young lawyer and a young doctor were vigorously competing for the affections of a charming and lovely young lady.  The poor lady just couldn't make up her mind as to which of the gentlemen would win her hand and so the competition with increasing wit and every angle possible to get the victory over the apposing suitor. 

The young lawyer was called out of town on a court case and fearing to lose out to the young doctor, he purchased a dozen apples and gave to his lady love before he departed.  He had always heard that 'an apple a day keeps the doctor away'.
